title: Server Tick
description: Makes the F3 TPS graph work on servers
body:
**Please note this mod is no longer developed, as a server-side TPS graph is available in vanilla since ~1.20.2.**

This Minecraft mod makes the TPS graph in the F3 Debug screen work on servers in the same way as in singleplayer. The mod must be installed both on the server and on the client for it to work, however no problems will occur if this is not the case (Client without the mod can connect to servers which have and vice-versa).

By default, only players that are op will see the graph (configurable). (This restriction is not in place on LAN games, everyone can see it there.)

Requires Fabric API.

A Paper plugin compatible with the client-side mod also exists. https://github.com/sammko/servertick-paper
